flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Jones County Junior College rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.9k → $4.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Jones County Junior College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.9k → $6.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Jones County Junior College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.9% → 0.0%).
